_comment: sovereign-os IPS host overview — operator-at-a-glance cockpit, now extended with the IPS-dectet enforcement-layer rollup (SDD-065..074 = 10 primitives). Original 8 observability verticals (M060 + MS022 + four-watchdog + modules + daemon-process + AppArmor + auth-events + systemd-units) remain. The new IPS-dectet rollup row consolidates active-enforcement count, pending-operator-decision count, observer-wedged count, and per-primitive active-count timeseries. Single-pane-of-glass — operators see the IPS host's entire defensive posture (observation + enforcement) without drilling into per-vertical dashboards. Project boundary R10212: pure read-only observability composition. Original recording-rules commit anchor: 594fd02 (preserved per audit-trail discipline).

panels.title: ANY vertical critical?
panels.description: Cross-vertical critical rollup (sovereign_os:critical_state_any). Red = at least ONE vertical reports CRITICAL. Drill into per-vertical panels below to identify which.

panels.title: observer healthy count
panels.description: How many of the 3 textfile-observer verticals (four-watchdog + modules + daemon-process) are emitting fresh data. Healthy baseline is 3/3. Drift below = at least one observer wedged.

panels.title: ANY observer wedged?
panels.description: Cross-vertical observer-fault rollup. Red = at least ONE observer reports emit_failed OR observer-silent.

panels.title: M060 chain
panels.description: M060 chain-health worst-severity rollup.

panels.title: MS022 SSE
panels.description: MS022 SSE subscriber-quota global saturation as %.

panels.title: four-watchdog
panels.description: IPS-spine worst-severity (MS046+MS047+MS044+MS048).

panels.title: modules total
panels.description: selfdef module-catalog count.

panels.title: selfdefd RSS
panels.description: selfdef daemon memory.

panels.title: selfdefd FDs
panels.description: selfdef daemon open file descriptors.

panels.title: AppArmor enforce?
panels.description: selfdefd profile enforce state.

panels.title: auth failures (5m)
panels.description: Login failures in 5m rolling window. Red at 20 = brute-force.

panels.title: selfdef units failed
panels.description: selfdef-prefixed systemd units in failed state. Red at 1 = page-worthy.

panels.title: selfdef units active
panels.description: selfdef-prefixed systemd units currently active.

panels.title: cross-vertical rollups over time
panels.description: All 3 cross-vertical rollup metrics (critical / observer-fault / observer-count) over time. Spike in critical OR fault correlated to drop in observer-count = compound incident.

panels.title: observer-healthy-count over time (baseline 3/3)
panels.description: Healthy textfile-observer count over time. 3/3 = green baseline.

panels.title: active enforcements (sum across 14 IPS primitives)
panels.description: Total active handles across blockset + quarantine + revocations + token-revocations + mfa-grant-revocations + netns-isolations + mount-bindings + process-tree-freezes + socket-fd-revocations + env-scrubs + capability-drops + kernel-keyring-evictions + apparmor-profile-pivots + bpf-map-element-clears. Spike = active incident response.

targets.expr: (selfdef_blockset_v4_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_blockset_v6_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_quarantine_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_revocations_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_token_revocations_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_mfa_grant_revocations_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_netns_isolations_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_mount_bindings_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_process_tree_freezes_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_socket_fd_revocations_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_env_scrubs_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_capability_drops_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_kernel_keyring_evictions_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_apparmor_profile_pivots_active_count or vector(0)) + (selfdef_bpf_map_element_clears_active_count or vector(0))

panels.title: pending operator decisions (sum across queues)
panels.description: Total pending operator decisions across all 14 IPS-quattuordectet cockpit queues. Drives operator attention to the cockpit cards.

targets.expr: (selfdef_quarantine_pending_decisions or vector(0)) + (selfdef_revocations_pending_restores or vector(0)) + (selfdef_token_revocations_pending_restores or vector(0)) + (selfdef_mfa_grant_revocations_pending_restores or vector(0)) + (selfdef_netns_isolations_pending_releases or vector(0)) + (selfdef_mount_bindings_pending_rebinds or vector(0)) + (selfdef_process_tree_freezes_pending_thaws or vector(0)) + (selfdef_socket_fd_revocations_pending_restores or vector(0)) + (selfdef_env_scrubs_pending_restores or vector(0)) + (selfdef_capability_drops_pending_restores or vector(0)) + (selfdef_kernel_keyring_evictions_pending_restores or vector(0)) + (selfdef_apparmor_profile_pivots_pending_restores or vector(0)) + (selfdef_bpf_map_element_clears_pending_restores or vector(0))

panels.title: enforcement-layer observers wedged (out of 14)
panels.description: Count of IPS-quattuordectet textfile observers reporting *_textfile_emit_failed > 0. Baseline is 0; any > 0 means the enforcement-layer observability is partially blind.

targets.expr: (selfdef_quarantine_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_revocations_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_token_revocations_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_mfa_grant_revocations_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_netns_isolations_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_mount_bindings_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_process_tree_freezes_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_socket_fd_revocations_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_env_scrubs_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_capability_drops_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_kernel_keyring_evictions_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_apparmor_profile_pivots_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0)) + (selfdef_bpf_map_element_clears_textfile_emit_failed or vector(0))

panels.title: per-primitive active-count over time
panels.description: Each IPS primitive's active_count plotted separately so operator can identify which axis is firing in an incident.

panels.title: MS048 Goldilocks Scheduler — runtime routing layer (peer of the IPS enforcement layer above)
scheduler observer healthy
panels.description: 1 = selfdef-scheduler-textfile observer fresh + write-succeeded. 0 = wedged. Architectural peer of the per-IPS textfile_emit_failed sentinels.

panels.title: scheduler substrates healthy (of 3)
panels.description: PSI + DCGM + human-gate. 3 = all healthy (substrate-trio fully feeds the scheduler); 0 = all blind (scheduler operating without ground-truth signal). Red at 0, yellow 1-2, green 3.

panels.title: scheduler backpressure surfaces firing (of 6)
panels.description: cpu + ram + io + Blackwell VRAM + 3090 busy + human-gate-high. The scheduler is throttling autonomous routing while ≥1 surface fires.

targets.expr: selfdef_scheduler_cpu_pressure + selfdef_scheduler_ram_pressure + selfdef_scheduler_io_pressure + selfdef_scheduler_blackwell_vram_high + selfdef_scheduler_gpu3090_busy + selfdef_scheduler_human_gate_queue_high

panels.title: human-gate queue depth (across 14 IPS queues)
panels.description: Sum of pending operator-decision queue entries across the 14 IPS primitives. Same datum as the per-IPS pending_restores rollup above, surfaced via the scheduler's human-gate source for routing-decision context.

title: sovereign-os — IPS host overview (single-pane-of-glass)
